name: Blockchain Coinvestors Acquisition Corp. I Warrant
summary: Blockchain Coinvestors Acquisition Corp. I Warrant entitles the holder to purchase one Class A ordinary share of the company. Blockchain Coinvestors Acquisition Corp. I is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is sponsored by Blockchain Coinvestors.
